message:
fix(label_intel): update test assertion to use renamed field open_count

The LabelSummary struct field was renamed from issue_count to open_count
to better reflect that it tracks open issues specifically. This commit
updates the corresponding test assertion in
test_label_health_single_label to match the renamed field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
